design_philosophy.core_loop: Collect scattered 'spots' throughout platforming levels to unlock caged companions; use jumping and bubble-throwing mechanics to navigate hazards and defeat enemies
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Time limits per level combined with collection quota requirements create pressure between exploration (finding all spots) and speed
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Rescue mascot character as a cute, agile bubble-throwing protagonist; the 7 Up brand positioning emphasizes 'cool' and lighthearted adventure
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Strong brand integration (Spot mascot, UNCOLA slogan spelling in bonus stages) combined with deliberate cartoon aesthetic and animation-forward design philosophy; prioritizes visual charm and accessibility over mechanical depth

difficulty.lives_system: Health monitored by visual Spot face indicator that degrades with damage; character falls when fully damaged
difficulty.continues_system: Continues available through hidden letters spelling 'UNCOLA' in bonus stages; collecting a continue allows restart at current level with points reset
difficulty.checkpointing: Flagpole checkpoints distributed throughout levels; no persistent save feature
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Low; difficulty appears fixed per level with increasing spot collection requirements as game progresses, creating natural difficulty curve

progression.unlock_mechanism: Collecting required number of scattered 'spots' unlocks progression to rescue caged companions and advance level; quota increases as game progresses
replayability_hooks: Bonus stages accessible after level completion with sufficient spot collection
Hidden continue letters encourage thoroughness in bonus stages
Multi-platform releases create version differences (Genesis, SNES, Master System, Game Gear, Game Boy, Amiga, MS-DOS)

world_building_techniques: Brand mascot protagonist (Spot) as narrative anchor
Rescue mission framing (saving other spots from cages)
Visual identity through cartoon aesthetic and character animation

danger_signals: Enemies and their projectiles inflict damage
environmental_storytelling: Caged spots waiting rescue establish context for level objectives
Scattered spot collectibles throughout environment guide exploration
